---
title : "Robust Regression"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: zephyr
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg; Pkg.activate(".."); Pkg.status()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using CairoMakie, Statistics, Random, LinearAlgebra
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
# Setup
Random.seed!(1)

n = 100
x = rand(n)
xtest = collect(0:0.001:1)
std_noise = 0.1
y = sin.(x.^2 .* 6π) .+ std_noise .* randn(n) .^ 5
ytest = sin.(xtest.^2 .* 6π)

alpha_kernel = 10
sq_dist(a, b) = (a .- b').^2
K = exp.(-alpha_kernel .* sq_dist(x, x))
Ktest = exp.(-alpha_kernel .* sq_dist(xtest, x))
lambdas = 10.0 .^ (-12:0.5:1)

square_error = zeros(length(lambdas))
robust_error = zeros(length(lambdas))

# square loss
for ilambda = 1:length(lambdas)
    lambda = lambdas[ilambda]

    alpha = (K + n * lambda * I) \ y
    ypredtest = Ktest * alpha

    square_error[ilambda] = mean((ypredtest .- ytest).^2)
    robust_error[ilambda] = mean(1 .- exp.(-(ypredtest .- ytest).^2))
end

min_idx = argmin(robust_error)
lambda_best = lambdas[min_idx]
alpha = (K + n * lambda_best * I) \ y
ypredtest_sq = Ktest * alpha

# robust loss
square_error_rob = zeros(length(lambdas))
robust_error_rob = zeros(length(lambdas))
ypredtest_rob_temp = zeros(length(ytest))

for ilambda = 1:length(lambdas)
    lambda = lambdas[ilambda]

    inv_mat = (K + n * lambda * I)
    z = -5:0.01:5

    for itest = 1:length(ytest)
        temp = inv_mat \ Ktest[itest, :]
        loss_matrix = 1 .- exp.(-((z' .- y).^2))
        vals = loss_matrix' * temp
        b = argmin(vals)
        ypredtest_rob_temp[itest] = z[b]
    end

    square_error_rob[ilambda] = mean((ypredtest_rob_temp .- ytest).^2)
    robust_error_rob[ilambda] = mean(1 .- exp.(-(ypredtest_rob_temp .- ytest).^2))
end

min_idx_rob = argmin(robust_error)
lambda_best_rob = lambdas[min_idx_rob]

ypredtest_rob = zeros(length(ytest))
inv_mat_rob = (K + n * lambda_best_rob * I)
z_final = -5:0.005:5

for itest = 1:length(ytest)
    temp = inv_mat_rob \ Ktest[itest, :]
    loss_matrix = 1 .- exp.(-((z_final' .- y).^2))
    vals = loss_matrix' * temp
    b = argmin(vals)
    ypredtest_rob[itest] = z_final[b]
end
```

```{julia}
fig = Figure(size=(1000, 500))

ax1 = Axis(fig[1, 1], xlabel="x", ylabel="y", title="square loss")
lines!(ax1, xtest, ytest, color=red, linewidth=2, label="target")
lines!(ax1, xtest, ypredtest_sq, color=:black, linewidth=2, label="prediction")
scatter!(ax1, x, y, color=blue, marker=:cross, markersize=10)
axislegend(ax1)

ax2 = Axis(fig[1, 2], xlabel="x", ylabel="y", title="robust loss")
lines!(ax2, xtest, ytest, color=red, linewidth=2, label="target")
lines!(ax2, xtest, ypredtest_rob, color=:black, linewidth=2, label="prediction")
scatter!(ax2, x, y, color=blue, marker=:cross, markersize=10)
axislegend(ax2)

fig
```
